meaning: n.洗眼水,<俚>胡话,空话,拍马,奉承,骗局,表面文章
examples: A medicinal lotion applied to the eye; eyewash.
C. Test alarm of every safety shower and eyewash station.
Eg. When you keep your eyes skinned, you will fine it to be a counterfeit eyewash.
The Times of India says Mr Srinivasan's decision to step aside has been dismissed by many as an "eyewash" and a "sham".
